author: codex-audit

patch.value: Expose runtime command-path state in extension explore

GitHub issue #27 reported that a project extension could appear active in extension explore while its registered command path was unavailable. Extension explore should surface runtime activation state and registered command paths so agents can trust the lifecycle output.

pm extension/package explore reports runtime_active/activation_status plus command paths for enabled extensions; extension-defined paths such as pm-graph export remain invocable; regression tests cover the behavior; GitHub issue #27 is addressed.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Duplicate check before create: pm search pm-graph command path active extension github issue 27 --limit 10 found only closed historical extension lifecycle items and no open issue for this GitHub report.

message: Track GitHub issue 27 extension command path fix

Verification passed: linked focused suite (112 tests), full release gates (1289 tests, 100% coverage, static/docs/secret/pack/compatibility), pm health/vectorization ok with only known history drift warnings.
